headline: China Watchdog Monitoring US Lawsuit Over Insider Trading Claims
summary: (Bloomberg) -- China’s securities regulator said it was monitoring developments in a US lawsuit after Susquehanna International Group alleged insider traders made at least $100 million from well-timed options bets before Beijing’s recent crackdown on illegal cross-border trading.
